name: Browser Toolbox
description: A pure frontend browser toolbox with commonly used utilities.
longDescription: A single-page collection of everyday browser utilities — open and use instantly, no install required. Handy for quick measuring, converting, and debugging.

name: P4G Persona Fusion Finder
description: Look up Persona fusion recipes in Persona 4 Golden.
longDescription: A Persona 4 Golden fusion helper: search by target Persona or materials and find recipes without digging through guide spreadsheets.

name: Instagram Collage Maker
longDescription: Build Instagram-style collages in the browser — layout and export in one place, ready to share.

name: Video Downloader
description: Parse a video link and download without watermark when possible.
longDescription: Paste a video URL to resolve a downloadable source, preferring watermark-free media when available — handy for archiving or editing.
